clips.prompt: Wide establishing shot — the brand's world, cinematic atmosphere, sets the mood and tone for the story
Medium shot — the founder or key person, authentic and passionate, speaking to camera or working
Close-up detail — the craft, the process, hands working with materials, attention to quality
Product reveal — the result of the craft, beautifully lit, hero moment
Community impact — real people using and loving the product, emotional connection
Brand signature moment — the final frame that captures the brand essence, memorable and shareable
